era.zh: 汉代起源；北宋天圣五年（1027年）留下卢道隆完整齿数
era.en: Han origin; Lu Daolong's complete tooth counts survive from 1027

oneLiner.zh: 用两级十进制减速把车轮里程变成击鼓与击镯。
oneLiner.en: Two decimal reductions turn wheel travel into drum and chime strikes.

principle.zh: 足轮经过1/100和1/1000两级减速，将连续行程离散为里程；中平轮每周触发木人击鼓，上平轮每周触发木人击镯。
principle.en: The road wheel passes through 1/100 and 1/1000 reductions to discretize distance; each full turn of the middle wheel triggers a drum, and each full turn of the upper wheel triggers a chime.

sources.quote: 記裏鼓車，一名大章車。赤質，四面畫花鳥，重台，勾闌，鏤拱。行一里，則上層木人擊鼓；十里，則次層木人擊鐲。一轅，鳳首，駕四馬。

translation.zh: 记里鼓车又叫大章车，车身红色，绘有花鸟并设重台栏杆。每走一里，上层木人击鼓；每走十里，下层木人击镯。
translation.en: The odometer carriage, also called the Great Display Carriage, is red and decorated with birds and flowers. A figure beats a drum every li and another strikes a chime every ten li.

sources.quote: 足輪各徑六尺，圍一丈八尺。足輪一周，而行地三步。以古法六尺為步，三百步為裏……立輪一，附於左足，徑一尺三寸八分……出齒十八……下平輪一，其徑四尺一寸四分……出齒五十四……立貫心軸一，其上設銅旋風輪一，出齒三……中立平輪一，其徑四尺……出齒百……次安小平輪一……出齒十……上平輪一……出齒百……其中平輪轉一周，車行一里，下一層木人擊鼓；上平輪轉一周，車行十里，上一層木人擊鐲。凡用大小輪八，合二百八十五齒，遞相鉤鎖，犬牙相製，周而復始。

translation.zh: 足轮直径六尺，每周走三步，三百步为一里。传动依次使用18齿立轮、54齿下平轮、3齿旋风轮、100齿中平轮、10齿小平轮和100齿上平轮；中平轮一周击鼓，上平轮一周击镯，八轮合计285齿。
translation.en: Each six-chi road wheel travels three bu per turn, with 300 bu to a li. The train uses an 18-tooth vertical wheel, 54-tooth lower wheel, 3-tooth whirlwind wheel, 100-tooth middle wheel, 10-tooth small wheel, and 100-tooth upper wheel. The middle wheel triggers the drum, the upper wheel the chime, and all eight wheels total 285 teeth.

dimensions.basis: 宋制一尺为0.312米；原文采用周三径一

dimensions.ancient: 一尺三寸八分，出齒十八
四尺一寸四分，出齒五十四

summary.zh: 八轮、285齿的两级十进制里程传动。
summary.en: An eight-wheel, 285-tooth train with two decimal distance reductions.

evidence.zh: 《宋史》逐项记载轮径、齿数以及一里击鼓、十里击镯。
evidence.en: The Song Shi records each diameter and tooth count and states the one-li drum and ten-li chime actions.

detail.zh: 足轮直径六尺而周长一丈八尺，明确使用“周三径一”；展示时应保留这一计算基础。
detail.en: A six-chi diameter with an eighteen-chi circumference explicitly uses the approximation circumference = 3 × diameter, which the exhibit must preserve.

detail.zh: 多轮检索仍未找到博物馆复原品的Commons照片，画廊必须以项目渲染为主。
detail.en: Repeated searches found no Commons photograph of a museum replica, so the gallery must lead with project renders.

exhibit.zh: 记里鼓车相关复原，展出状态未核实
exhibit.en: Related odometer reconstruction; display status unverified

images.title: Han dynasty odometer cart
images.author: An artist from the Han Dynasty
images.attributionText: An artist from the Han Dynasty, Public domain, via Wikimedia Commons

images.title: Diagram of a Song dynasty odometer cart
images.author: Dingyuang , Gisling

hook.zh: 这是一台十进制机械计数器：1/100和1/1000减速把连续滚动变成离散里程，八轮总齿数正好是285。
hook.en: A decimal mechanical counter: 1/100 and 1/1000 reductions turn continuous rolling into distance steps, and the eight wheels total exactly 285 teeth.

demo.zh: 快进到0.99里，再慢放3齿旋风轮推动100齿中平轮最后一齿，木人举槌击鼓，里程表翻转。
demo.en: Fast-forward to 0.99 li, then slow down as the 3-tooth whirlwind wheel advances the final tooth of the 100-tooth middle wheel, raising the figure's mallet to strike.

echo.zh: 它是出租车计价器和汽车小计里程表的机械祖先。
echo.en: It is a mechanical ancestor of the taximeter and trip counter.
